==old wikitext==

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[幕末]]の[[陸軍]]の人物のカテゴリ。 ==関連カテゴリ== * [[:Category:幕末の海軍の人物]]
{{citation needed|はくまつのりくくんのしんふつ}}
==Old Content== ==Japanese Content== [[幕末]]の[[陸軍]]の人物のカテゴリ。 ==関連カテゴリ== * [[:Category:幕末の海軍の人物]]
{{citation needed|はくまつのりくくんのしんふつ}}
==Old Content==
==old wikitext==
.
==Categories==
{{translated page|ja|Category:幕末の陸軍の人物|comment=category history here}} {{translated page|ja|Category:幕末の陸軍の人物|version=69080014}} [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Japanese Army Personnel]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:People of Bakumatsu Militias]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Japanese Army Personnel]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:People of Bakumatsu Militias]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:幕末の陸軍の人物]] [[ko:Category:막말 육군 사람]] [[sn:Category:Army Personnel of the Bakumatsu Period]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:Yamada_Akiyoshi]] [[zh:Category:幕末陸軍人物]]

Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)

Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
